hardware.storage_gpu: RTX 3090 (SM 8.6, 24 GB) — VRAM lending via VRAMancer ReBAR

phase_results.phase_1_tilelang_sm120: PASS — FP8 GEMM kernel (act_quant + fp8_gemm) compiled and executed on RTX 5070 Ti SM12.0
phase_results.phase_1_tilelang_sm86: FAIL (expected) — RTX 3090 SM8.6 has no FP8 tensor cores
phase_results.phase_3_download: IN_PROGRESS — 74 files fetching (159.6 GB / 46 safetensors shards)

tilelang_patches.description: Three patches applied to .venv (NOT tracked by git) to enable FP8 MMA on SM12.0 with nvcc 12.0

patch_1.change: Add early return 'return 89' for major >= 12 (SM12.x Blackwell consumer). nvcc < 12.8 does not know sm_120/sm_120a.

patch_2.change: code=sm_{arch} → code=compute_{arch} (embed PTX not binary cubin for forward compat)

patch_3.change: New _find_compat_ptxas() helper + two-stage path: nvcc 12.0 → PTX, bump .version 8.0→8.4, return PTX str. CUDA driver (595.58, CUDA 13.2) JIT-compiles for SM12.0 at load time.

root_cause_analysis: nvcc 12.0 generates PTX ISA 8.0; FP8 MMA instructions (SM89_16x8x32_F32E4M3E4M3F32_TN) require PTX ISA 8.4+. Fix: generate PTX with nvcc 12.0, bump .version header to 8.4, return as PTX string. Driver (CUDA 13.2 / 595.58) JIT-compiles transparently for SM12.0.
next_step: Wait for Phase 3 download to complete, then Phase 4 convert (MP=2), Phase 5 load test on 5070Ti+3090 with VRAMancer expert offloading
